title: 回退今天全部 Ask 功能（回到最初）
prompt:
GOAL: Fully revert ALL of today's (2026-06-23) "Ask" review-action work so the codebase returns to the state BEFORE it ("回到最初"). This is a complete rollback, NOT a surgical removal — nothing Ask-related is preserved.

The three commits to undo (chronological order oldest → newest):
- 76dae503  feat(review): add generic "inject prompt into session" primitive for Ask
- b050e79e  feat(review): backend support for the "Ask" review action
- 37a306b5  feat(review): add "Ask" split-button action to review cards (web-ui)

APPROACH — use `git revert` (NOT reset): these three commits are INTERLEAVED with unrelated commits (db work, etc.) that must stay, so a reset is wrong. Revert them in REVERSE chronological order:
  git revert --no-commit 37a306b5
  git revert --no-commit b050e79e
  git revert --no-commit 76dae503
Then resolve any conflicts (some files — src/core/api-contract.ts, src/commands/task.ts, src/trpc/runtime-api.ts, src/trpc/app-router.ts — were also touched by later unrelated db commits) so the NET effect is: all Ask code gone, unrelated work intact. Commit the result.

IMPORTANT — this rollback INCLUDES (do not try to preserve them):
- The `injectSessionPrompt` primitive (web-ui/src/git-actions/inject-session-prompt.ts) AND the use-git-actions.ts refactor onto it. Reverting 76dae503 restores web-ui/src/hooks/use-git-actions.ts to its ORIGINAL pre-Ask implementation, so the Commit/Open-PR actions go back to how they worked before today. That is correct and intended ("回到最初").
- All of: board-card-ask-control.tsx, use-ask-action.ts, build-ask-prompt.ts, ask-guardrail.ts, resolve-review-question.ts, src/session/review-question.ts, reviewQuestion field + deriveReviewQuestion, task origin{agentId,threadId}, the sendSessionPrompt tRPC + schemas + `kanban task message` CLI — all gone.

DO NOT TOUCH (unrelated, pre-existing "ask" that is NOT the review action — these commits don't touch them anyway):
- the `permission.ask` hook in src/terminal/agent-session-adapters.ts
- "ask for approval before making changes" prompt text (pi-system-prompt.ts, append-system-prompt.ts)
- the OAuth "ask the user to paste an API key" comment

ACCEPTANCE:
- `git log` shows three new revert commits; no Ask review-action code or references remain anywhere (grep clean for board-card-ask-control, use-ask-action, build-ask-prompt, ask-guardrail, inject-session-prompt, review-question, sendSessionPrompt).
- Commit/Open-PR review actions work via their original pre-Ask implementation.
- Unrelated db/other work from today is untouched.
- `bun run typecheck`, `web:typecheck`, biome/lint, and the test suite all clean.
